name: Veal Steak Milan- Gwhp32
recipeInstructions:
Notes: Slice mushrooms thin. Veal steaks should be 1/4 inch thick. Rosemary should be crushed when used. Mei Yen seasoning available in Spice Islands Brand spices.
Take sour cream from refrigerator when starting preparation, so it may warm up a bit.
1. Saute the mushrooms in butter in a large heavy skillet until they are lightly browned and caramelized.
2. Remove the mushrooms, leaving the butter in the pan.
3. Brown the veal steaks well in the remaining butter. Sprinkle with Mei Yen seasoning during the browning process.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the onion salt, garlic salt, and crushed rosemary.
5. Add white wine to the spice mixture and stir until combined.
6. When the veal is browned, pour the wine and spice mixture over the steaks. Return the mushrooms to the pan.
7. Cover the skillet and simmer on low heat for 30 minutes.
8. Stir in the sour cream with a spoon, being careful not to boil the mixture. The sour cream should be incorporated into the pan juices only.
9. Add the reserved mushrooms and continue heating for an additional 5 minutes over very low heat.
